reviews.review_description: This game is hanging while playing, then again you need to quit the game and restarts

So much fun! I love the simplicity. If u love Operation Wolf or the like, u love this.

My only gripes are that it is a bit buggy but almost everything I have played on my quest 3s (or psvr for that matter) is. And it would help if there was little colored arrows or somwthing over enemies. The distant ones can be hard to see.
No arcade environment like in the pics on the store page. False advertising some other version of the game.

developer_response.body:
Hi Jacksin,

Thanks for taking the time to leave your feedback.

We’re a bit surprised by your comment, as everything shown on the store page is part of the real gameplay experience in Operation Warcade. You get to pilot helicopters, trucks, boats, planes… all of it is included and available within the immersion zones.

We also provide a free demo with the full first level so players can try the game before deciding to buy.

If there's something specific you feel is misleading, feel free to reach out—we’d be happy to look into it.

Best regards,
Iván
Ivanovich Games
support@ivanovichgames.com

reviews.review_description:
This is a really awesome game with a old school vibe. Love all the 3d effects & how you are put in different mini games through out the game. The only problem I have, is that it has to much glitchs & mishaps.  
If it clear up it would be one of the best games on the quest.

… but it’s too glitchy… 

Compared to the PCVR version, the standalone version  looks like you’re looking through dirty lenses… everything is cloudy and hazy, making for an uncomfortable viewing experience. The flying and bow/arrow mechanics are atrocious… also the game cheats… on some missions where I’m supposed to blow up multiple enemies with a single grenade… I never get credited for doing it… it asks for 5, I blow up six+ and it STILL tells me I didn’t pass… also, I’ll rescue hostages only to have them jump off ships or get run over by vehicles… replayabiliy should be based on fun not replaying to try to beat frustratingly flawed goals… the PCVR has the same issues, but at least I can SEE

developer_response.body: If you press the pause button you can check the status of the mission in realtime. We've checked the missions and works perfect. If you can send us a video would be great support@ivanovichgames.com

reviews.review_description:
I remember playing this game in the arcade back in the '80s when it was called Operation Wolf.  Now it has been updated to ad the VR experience!  

You start the game like you're playing an old-fashioned coin-op game, standing at the game front, and then while you're playing you can suddenly be brought INSIDE the game and playing it in the first person as you try to finish your operation. 

I found this in/out of VR confusing at first but the more I played the game the more I liked the idea and the gameplay. 

I dropped the rating recently because after a year there is still too many glitches in the game. 

I shot the arcade screen to start the next round when I found myself standing several feet to the left of the machine and the game was running.  

Part of the time everything was messed up and you couldn't distinguish anything on the screen and part of the time it was perfectly clear. 

I had to get out of the game and restart it to fix the problem.   

It seems like nothing has changed or was added/fixed in over a year.  What a shame, this game had real potential.

I've had this game on PCVR for years. I have both the Steam and Oculus PC versions and like the last reviewer,  both have those green 1's and 0's raining at all times, weird to hear the playstation version also suffered.  It still looks great and plays well on PC though even with the green binary rain.

 I'm really loving the game all over again on my Quest's. I have both Quest 1 and 2 and I'm torn as to which one it looks better on.  The graphics of course don't compare to the PC version, but the gameplay is still there.  I think with Oculus's upcoming ASW implementation and possibly AMD's FSR, Operation Warcade has the potential to be the best game on Quest with 2076 being a close second.
The best game for me! Nostalgic and super fun!

I played the demo a couple days ago and as soon as I found out the full game was out it was an instant buy for me. I guess this was out on other platforms from some of the reviews I've read. However, it's brand new to me and I love it so much. It is such a fun experience! Sometimes you're outside of the arcade sometimes you're inside of it, sometimes you're shooting a gun, sometimes you're flying an airplane. It's easy to understand and intuitive. I play sitting down and have absolutely no problems with it in this game. If you are on the fence play the demo don't miss this game it is so fun.

Wow, one more greeeeaaaat game from ivanovich. You have understand what VR is. I love 1976 and now you have topped it. The Mini games are so immersiv. And it seems, that 2076 is in the Pipeline? :-)  thumbs up. Great game developement studio.

Overall it’s a great game.

The main issue I have is flying an aeroplane in immersion mode which is extremely difficult. Controls of vehicles, planes etc could definitely be improved. 

However for the price, the game is great and deserves 5 stars. Loads of content , a great and unique VR game. 

Hopefully it keeps getting developed and possibly more maps are added going forward because it’s a great idea and a really fun game !! My favourite game on the Quest.
This is quite enjoyable but the game is a tad glitchy and gameplay could be smoother. Not bad and will appeal to fans of retro style games.
Instant buy after playing the demo...nuff said.

Update 1.2 ....  

Before i Update the game to 1.2 the game runs smooth with not so good graphics. After i Update the 1.2 Version. The game runs not smooth with many black screens and other mistakes in the game.. plz make a fixx

Update 1.3 

Wow it works great all Troubles i have it blown away. I think the graphics lock also better. Thx for new Update
Love this game, kill bad guys and chew bubblegum. Young people will love this game as much as us 49 somethings….  This is how we kicked butt when we were at the arcade.

I replayed the demo for hours before even realizing the game was already released. A very easy decision for me. I recommend this game for ANYONE who likes SHOOTERS period. It’s great for beginners and young people and it is so easy to learn how to play. Also can easily be played while sitting.
This game is insanely fun to play. Played the demo and it blew me away and then purchased the full game. Great action game
If you like the demo go for it, really good.

reviews.review_title: Excellent game, should be in the store
reviews.review_description:
So much fun, love the whole concept.  I’m pretty terrible flying the chopper and using the sniper rifle, but that just makes me want to keep coming back.

Missions are perfect length, love the different objectives and random humor tossed in.  Great job, thank you!

❤️Camera distance settings would be needed to make it more realistic as if we were standing in  front of the machine .Fantastic game
